rows.label: qev041403_MSG0001
rows.name:
Pissa is late, mo... What
is she doing, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041403_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hm? Are you Ngogo's
errand runner, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041403_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, you will do, mo. Because I got
blown away to a place like this, I
am so hungry I cannot move, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041403_MSG0004
rows.name:
Go fetch me some coldberries right
now, along with some spicy sacrifole
pollen to use for flavoring, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041403_MSG0005
rows.name:
You are quite an obedient one, mo! Once
we return to the caravan, I might even
let you replace Pissa as my advisor, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041403_MSG0006
rows.name:
It is best not to anger me
when I am hungry, mo. Just
hurry up and fetch them, mo![ST:wait ]
